untranslatable_reason: Signal requires estimation of 'fundamental value' and measurement of 'price deviation from fundamental value' (2.0% threshold). No fundamental value estimator is available in the allowed indicator set. 'Liquidity demand indicator' requires a composite measure not directly available. Substituted with volume ratio and SMA proximity as proxies, but this does not faithfully represent the original microstructure logic.
translation_notes: Interpreted price deviation from fundamental value as deviation from SMA_50 (long-term fair value proxy). Entry when price deviates 2%+ and volume indicates uninformed activity (vol_ratio_20 spike). Exit when price reverts within 0.3% of SMA or after 5 bars. Direction is context-dependent (long when price below SMA, short when above). This is a simplified approximation lacking true fundamental value estimation.
